body:
## Correctness
* WSRK multirate cleared stale inner tstops before each stage, so the fast tendency integrates over `[t, t+c·dt]` rather than the whole remaining span (was silently wrong on state-coupled problems).
* IMEX-SSPRK now routes implicit stages through the shared `solve_stage_implicit!` helper, so the public `initialize_imp!` hook is used (previously ARK-only).
* Newton passes the 0-based iteration index to `ConvergenceCondition`, fixing `MaximumErrorReduction` / `MinimumRateOfConvergence`.
* Newton initializes `j_lu` safely inside the iteration loop, ensuring the Jacobian is never factored before `j!` populates the prototype.
* `UpdateEveryN` reset-signal dispatch fixed (had bound the wrong type parameter, leaving the feature dead).
* `EveryXSimulationTime` is now `tdir`-aware (works with reverse-time integration); `reinit!` recomputes `tdir` from the new `tspan`.

## Performance
* `NewtonsMethod` now caches the LU factorization of dense Jacobian matrices across iterations, eliminating redundant factorizations when `update_j` does not refresh the Jacobian every iteration.
* `ClimaODEFunction` gains `HasExpLim` and `HasImp` type parameters, replacing runtime `isnothing` checks with `has_T_exp_T_lim(f)` and `has_T_imp(f)` to guarantee static compile-time branch elimination in GPU kernels.

## Validation / API improvements
* `KrylovMethod` gains a `preconditioner` field for passing standalone preconditioner objects (e.g., matrix-free or block-diagonal operators) directly to `Krylov.jl`.
* `RosenbrockTableau` asserts constant-diagonal `Γ`; `IMEXTableau`/`ExplicitTableau` assert `c == row-sums(a)` and `b` length.
* `UpdateEveryDt(dt::Real)` value constructor (old type-taking form deprecated).
* `tableau(name)` methods for IMEX/ERK names; `RosenbrockAlgorithm` exported with a name-taking constructor.
* `step!(advance_to_tstop=true)` guards empty `tstops`; `saveat` filters out-of-interval values.
* `LineSearch` keeps the lowest-residual iterate and never returns a non-finite one (no GPU-hostile logging).

## Surface / cleanup
* Re-export `EveryXSimulationTime` / `EveryXSimulationSteps` / `EveryXWallTimeSeconds` at the top level.
* `has_T_exp` gains an explicit `_has_exp` flag (false for limiter-only functions).
* Compat: Julia 1.10 floor; tightened CUDA / ClimaComms / Krylov bounds; updated test environment compat for `0.11`.
* Docstring accuracy, `docs/` updates for preconditioners and LU caching, dead-code removal, assorted nits.
* New tests: state-coupled multirate convergence, stateful Newton conditions, SSP `initialize_imp!`, `UpdateEveryN` reset / `UpdateEveryDt` value, reverse-time callbacks.

Closes #434
title: v1-readiness: correctness fixes, API validation, and docs

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Bugfix (relevant when cache is updated per step): post-Newton, if update_cache doesn't fire cache invoke cache_imp instead so the implicit-relevant cache still tracks the post-DSS solved state. Applied in both IMEX-ARK and IMEX-SSPRK.)

In the Content, I have included

title: Bugfix with updating cache per step
